headline: Admin dialogs no longer clip controls under the scrollbar
summary: Scrollable admin dialogs now reserve space for the scrollbar so right-edge controls stay fully visible.

items.title: Right edge of admin dialogs clipped by the scrollbar
items.body: The customer-stash editor and the per-user limits dialog reserved no space for their scrollbar, so on browsers that draw an overlay scrollbar (Windows 11, macOS) the right edge of controls — unit selectors, No-limit checkboxes — could sit under it. Both dialogs now reserve a scrollbar gutter, and the per-user limits dialog stays within the viewport on short screens instead of overflowing.
